---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve YourTripPlanner
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug, status:triage
assignees: ''

---

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots/GIFs
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem (especially for UI/Animation bugs involving GSAP or Framer Motion).

## Environment Details
- **Browser:** (e.g. Chrome, Safari)
- **Node.js Version:** (e.g. v18.x or v20.x)
- **Component:** (e.g. AI Assistant, Expense Tracker, Itinerary Generator, Socket.io Chat)

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., did Gemini 2.0 Flash return a weird response?).
